name: eai-gofer
description: Gofer pipeline: research, specify, plan, tasks, implement, validate workflow with multi-persona visuals.
author: Gofer team

commands.name: 0_business_scenario
commands.description: Define the business problem and scenario for Gofer to analyse and solve.

commands.name: 0a_problem_validation
commands.description: Validate the business problem using 5 Whys root-cause analysis and stakeholder mapping.

commands.name: 1_gofer_research
commands.description: Research codebase, CLI integrations, and technology landscape for the target feature.

commands.name: 2_gofer_specify
commands.description: Generate a feature specification from research findings and approved proposal review.

commands.name: 3_gofer_plan
commands.description: Create a detailed technical implementation plan with architecture, data model, and contracts.

commands.name: 4_gofer_tasks
commands.description: Break down the implementation plan into dependency-ordered, parallelisable tasks.

commands.name: 5_gofer_implement
commands.description: Execute all tasks from tasks.md phase by phase with feedback loops and engineering review.

commands.name: 6_gofer_validate
commands.description: Validate implemented work with evidence-backed scoring, blast-radius analysis, and engineering review.

commands.name: 6a_gofer_engineering_review
commands.description: Run a targeted engineering review on a specific component or concern.

commands.name: 7_gofer_save
commands.description: Save session state and create a handoff checkpoint for resumption in a new context.

commands.name: 7a_stakeholder_comms
commands.description: Generate stakeholder-facing communications: release notes, demo scripts, and change briefs.

commands.name: 8_gofer_resume
commands.description: Resume a previous Gofer session from a saved checkpoint file.

commands.name: 9_gofer_tests
commands.description: Generate comprehensive test suites from four testing perspectives for a target component.

commands.name: 10_gofer_cloud
commands.description: Deploy and configure the Gofer cloud integration for remote pipeline execution.

commands.name: gofer_constitution
commands.description: Create or update project constitution with coding principles and guidelines.

commands.name: gofer_hydrate
commands.description: Reverse-engineer specification from existing code (Hydration).

commands.name: gofer:personality
commands.description: Set the assistant personality for this Gofer session: friendly, pragmatic, or none (default).

commands.name: gofer:plan
commands.description: Toggle plan mode in the active CLI session for the next user prompt; non-pipeline control command.

commands.name: gofer:side
commands.description: Open a side conversation in the active CLI without disturbing the main pipeline state; resumable.

commands.name: gofer:vocabulary
commands.description: Extract domain terminology into a canonical feature glossary.

commands.name: gofer:diagnose
commands.description: Run a reproduce-minimize-instrument-fix loop for bugs and failing tests.

commands.name: gofer:tdd
commands.description: Guide a red-green-refactor loop tied to spec acceptance criteria.

commands.name: gofer:spec-summary
commands.description: Generate a business-friendly summary of feature value and scope.

commands.name: gofer:zoom-out
commands.description: Show how the current feature connects to broader system boundaries.
